public_reputation: Known around Mimolot Academy through day-to-day work as tutor-magistrate.
appearance: Quenra Quillfire carries the marks of tutor-magistrate in ink, rain, and polished cloth: practical wear, maintained details, and a look that suggests they expect to be read before they are trusted.
manner: Mixes instruction with judgment, correcting others in a way that reminds them learning here still serves power. In Mimolot Academy, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of tutor-magistrate in and around Mimolot Academy, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Mimolot Academy while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to reputational exposure is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Quenra Quillfire can draw the party into a locality problem centered on tutor-magistrate duties in Mimolot Academy.
Quenra Quillfire becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with tariff tensions around Mimolot Academy.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Quenra Quillfire is immediately readable as a tutor-magistrate tied to Mimolot Academy.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Mimolot Academy: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Quenra Quillfire presents as someone shaped by the duties of a tutor-magistrate and the daily pressures of Mimolot Academy.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a tutor-magistrate, and proof that strangers will not make Mimolot Academy harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Quenra Quillfire refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a tutor-magistrate too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can grant educational access, explain doctrine, and judge whether a party is worth sponsoring.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Quenra Quillfire adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Quenra Quillfire always knows more about Mimolot Academy than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a tutor-magistrate in Mimolot Academy.
social_texture: Quenra Quillfire speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Mimolot Academy, people read them as socially alert, procedural, and sensitive to status.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to favors and tariffs; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but reputational exposure becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Quenra touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Quenra Quillfire when the party needs a socially grounded face for Mimolot Academy: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
